page: Microsoft Azure DC64ads_v5 is a virtual machine instance belonging to the DCADSv5 family, running on the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor. It features 64 dedicated vCPUs based on the x86_64 architecture and is powered by an AMD processor. The instance is equipped with 256.0 GB of system memory, providing a balanced allocation of 4.0 GB of RAM per core.

This server type includes 2458 GB of local storage and is premium storage capable, allowing for high-performance disk configurations. It does not include any integrated GPUs or complimentary public IPv4 addresses. The hardware configuration is designed for workloads requiring a balance of compute resources, memory capacity, and substantial local disk space.

From a resource density perspective, the DC64ads_v5 offers a balanced ratio of memory to dedicated vCPUs alongside a large local storage capacity, making it a qualitatively cost-efficient option for workloads that require dedicated CPU execution without the premium cost of memory-optimized or GPU-accelerated hardware. Suitable workloads include general-purpose applications, database hosting, and local data processing tasks.
description: Microsoft Azure DC64ads_v5 is a virtual machine instance from the DCADSv5 family, utilizing the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor. It is configured with 64 dedicated x86_64 vCPUs powered by an AMD processor and paired with 256.0 GB of system memory, yielding a balanced 4.0 GB of RAM per core. The instance features 2458 GB of local storage and supports premium storage options, though it lacks integrated GPU hardware and complimentary public IPv4 addresses. With its balanced resource allocation and substantial local disk capacity, this server type is qualitatively cost-efficient for general-purpose computing. It is well-suited for workloads such as database hosting, local data processing, and enterprise applications requiring dedicated CPU resources.
og_description: Microsoft Azure DC64ads_v5 is a virtual machine featuring 64 dedicated AMD vCPUs, 256 GB of RAM, and 2458 GB of local storage, optimized for general-purpose and database workloads.
